title: Dream — Alexandria Haircut Trip + Card-as-Soul Attack
html:
TL;DR

  • Dream: Yahir takes a trip with Alexandria to get his hair cut "because she came through town" — the haircut-by-Alexandria framing tracks the real-world Alexandria-Nagy friendship pattern (she's the cosmetology / show-up-with-a-favor friend in this era).
  • Mid-dream, his car and other things are stolen while he's inside the house — earlier in the dream he'd been in a "scrumming" (skirmish) with people in the park.
  • He narrows down who it is and "fledges an attack" — "Their existence is tied to the card they possess, thus I destroy it with everything I got." Card-as-soul mechanic — destroying the artifact destroys the person.
  • The card-as-existence motif is a small but pure hit of the soul as beacon/identity-locus thinking that recurs across his dream notes (compare 2020 05 07 dream tribal fight and 2020 06 13 dream shooter prep — same period, same dream-as-symbolic-combat genre).
  • Captured Sep 26, 2020 — senior-year-of-high-school COVID-era, in the same fall as the come clean to dad sprint.

Key quotes

"Their existence is tied to the card they possess, thus I destroy it with everything I got."

"While I'm inside the house, someone steals my car and other things."

Open questions

  • The "card" image — Pokemon card, business card, ID card? The cartoonish-claw imagery from 2021 10 11 rick and morty brainstorming suggests a Pokemon-style card was the visual reference.
  • Why Alexandria specifically? She recurs in dream-context as a safe/companion figure — pattern worth tracing in densify.

Connections

alexandria nagy · soul as beacon · grants pass teen era · covid pandemic era · pokemon · 2020 05 07 dream tribal fight · 2020 06 13 dream shooter prep · 2021 10 11 rick and morty brainstorming
